heading: Apr 7, 2026, Ilocos
bullets: Feeling burned out lately. But at the same time, I’m grateful for everything I’ve managed to start and fix. There’s progress, even if it’s not always obvious. Still excited for what’s coming next.
For the first time in a while, I feel like I have a clear direction. Not everything is figured out, but there’s a plan forming—for this year and for the baby.
Enrolled in an automation course to build a stronger foundation. I want to do this properly, not just guess my way through it.

Realized that I’ve already been doing small automations before without really thinking much of it. Looking at it now, it’s actually something in demand. Feels like I’ve been sitting on something useful without fully seeing it.
Started fixing my finances. Consolidated all my credit card debts to reduce the burden and get a clearer picture of everything. It still feels heavy, but at least now it’s organized and manageable.
Had a moment of clarity that I’m not financially ready yet to build a family. It’s not fear, more of a wake-up call. I need a real plan—not just ideas, but something structured and intentional.
I’m going to be a dad. It wasn’t planned, but I’m genuinely excited. There’s still a bit of disbelief, but more than anything, it feels like something meaningful is starting.

Welcomed the year with the flu. Not the best start, but also not surprising. It’s becoming a pattern, and I’m starting to take it as a sign that I need to take my health more seriously again. Thinking of getting back in shape—not just temporarily, but consistently.
